overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking and jogging through a lush summer forest. The character moves from a wildflower meadow onto a winding dirt path through dense trees, with dynamic lighting shifting between sunlit clearings and shaded woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit meadow with tall grass and wildflowers

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging pace through the meadow
approaching a dirt trail entrance between large trees

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grass and colorful wildflowers in an open forest meadow

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees with thick trunks scattered throughout the meadow
lush green grass reaching knee height covering the forest floor
tall spires of purple flowers dotting the grassy areas
clusters of small white flowers scattered in the grass
bright red poppies visible among the greenery

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit forest meadow with the character walking through knee-high grass and colorful wildflowers including purple lupines and red poppies. Large oak trees are scattered throughout the clearing. The character accelerates to a jog as they approach a trail entrance between the trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded forest trail with dense canopy cover

events.description: character steps from grassy meadow onto defined dirt forest path
moving under thick tree canopy causing significant shadow and dappled light

agents.ego_description: jogging along a winding dirt path through densely wooded forest with swords visible on back

entered.detail: well-trodden earth trail winding through the trees
thick overhead foliage blocking most direct sunlight
large rocks and boulders alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open meadow onto a defined dirt path entering a densely wooded area. The lighting shifts dramatically as the thick tree canopy blocks direct sunlight, creating a tunnel-like effect with dappled shadows on the path. Large rocks appear alongside the trail as the character continues jogging through the shaded forest.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail with mixed sunlight and clearings

events.description: emerging from dense shade back into areas of direct sunlight
character slows to walking pace while navigating a winding section of trail

agents.ego_description: walking along a sunlit winding path with occasional clearings visible through the trees

entered.detail: rocks and boulders scattered along the path edges
shrubs with white blossoms lining the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character emerging from the dense shaded forest into a more open woodland trail with mixed lighting. The path winds through areas of direct sunlight and shade, with scattered rocks and white flowering bushes visible along the route. The character slows to a walking pace as the trail curves through the bright summer forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant summer forest that transitions from a bright wildflower meadow into a shaded woodland tunnel before opening back into a sun-dappled trail. It begins in a sunlit clearing where the character walks through knee-high grass and colorful purple and red wildflowers among scattered oak trees. As the character accelerates to a jog, the scene shifts from the open meadow onto a defined dirt path that enters a densely wooded area, where the thick canopy blocks the sun to create a tunnel of dappled shadows and rocky edges. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the deep shade into a more open woodland trail characterized by alternating patches of light and shadow. Finally, the path winds past white flowering bushes and scattered rocks as the character slows to a walking pace under the bright summer sky.
